description: Unified install/configure/enable surface for three MCP component kinds (mcp-server / managed-app / mcp-app) inside the webapp Admin Panel. Catalog endpoint /api/v2/mcp/market fans out across MCP.serverApps + ManagedAppRegistry.list + McpAppStore.listApps. Persisted in managed-apps.json plus two-tier mcp-apps.json. Shipped (live as of 2026-05-04).

activities.title: List Available Apps
activities.description: GET /api/v2/mcp/market (server/routes/mcp.ts L29-L116) parallel-fans out the three sources and normalizes each entry to a MarketApp shape. Reads gauth.json so OAuth-expired apps surface needs_auth.

activities.title: Fetch MCP Server Apps
activities.description: MCP.serverApps() (mcp/index.ts L811) returns ServerApp shape (L803) for stdio/HTTP servers declared in mcp.json.

activities.title: Fetch Managed Apps
activities.description: ManagedAppRegistry.list() reads ~/.config/opencode/managed-apps.json. BUILTIN_CATALOG (mcp/app-registry.ts:272) is currently empty; mechanism on standby.

activities.title: Fetch Store Apps
activities.description: McpAppStore.listApps().catch(()=>[]) merges /etc/opencode/mcp-apps.json (system, sudo opencode-app-install) with ~/.config/opencode/mcp-apps.json (user). System wins on id collision.

activities.title: Normalize And Decorate
activities.description: Each entry mapped to MarketApp (kind, name, description, icon, status, tools, enabled, optional auth+error). gauth.json consulted to attach needs_auth / 'OAuth token expired' instead of silent failure.

activities.title: Install App By Kind
activities.description: Kind-dependent install branch: mcp-server uses POST /:id/connect; managed-app uses POST /apps/:appId/install; mcp-app uses POST /store/apps (GitHub URL or local path) optionally preceded by POST /store/apps/preview dry-run.

activities.title: Connect MCP Server
activities.description: POST /:id/connect / /disconnect for stdio or HTTP servers from mcp.json.

activities.title: Install Managed App
activities.description: POST /apps/:appId/install runs ManagedAppRegistry install state machine (mcp/app-registry.ts L119-L267 in mcp.ts).

activities.title: Preview Store App
activities.description: POST /store/apps/preview reads remote/local manifest dry-run; rejects bad manifest before commit.

activities.title: Register Store App
activities.description: POST /store/apps via McpAppStore.cloneAndRegister (GitHub URL) or addApp (local path). Persists to ~/.config/opencode/mcp-apps.json.

activities.title: Configure App Settings
activities.description: POST /apps/:appId/config (managed) and /store/apps/:id/config (store, secrets). Settings dialog renders dynamic fields from settingsSchema returned by the catalog endpoint.

activities.title: Authorize App OAuth
activities.description: GET /api/v2/mcp/apps/:appId/oauth/connect opens 600x700 popup; callback persists token, emits managed_app.updated. Token expiry surfaces as needs_auth + 'OAuth token expired'.

activities.title: Uninstall App
activities.description: POST /apps/:appId/uninstall (managed), DELETE /store/apps/:id (store), POST /:id/disconnect (mcp-server). PATCH /store/apps/:id and POST /apps/:appId/disable provide the toggle-off path before uninstall.
